sources.name: Nature IC / CMOS / RF / Mixed-Signal
sources.query: "integrated circuit" OR CMOS OR BiCMOS OR RFIC OR "analog circuit" OR "mixed-signal" OR ADC OR DAC OR PLL OR LNA OR "power amplifier"
sources.notes: Core IC-design coverage for an ISSCC/JSSC-oriented researcher.

sources.name: Nature Semiconductor Devices & Memory
sources.query: semiconductor OR transistor OR FinFET OR GAAFET OR SRAM OR DRAM OR RRAM OR MRAM OR FeFET OR memristor OR "phase-change memory"
sources.notes: Semiconductor-device and emerging-memory coverage without generic materials noise.

sources.name: Nature AI Accelerators
sources.query: "AI accelerator" OR "machine learning accelerator" OR "AI chip" OR "neural processing unit" OR "tensor accelerator" OR "transformer accelerator" OR "LLM accelerator"
sources.notes: AI-chip and accelerator architectures.

sources.name: Nature Core AI Models & Methods
sources.query: "foundation model" OR "large language model" OR "generative AI" OR "multimodal model" OR "vision-language model" OR "reinforcement learning" OR "self-supervised learning" OR "robot learning"
sources.notes: Core AI advances worth tracking beyond hardware, with applied-domain noise filtered after retrieval.

sources.name: Nature Compute-in-Memory & Neuromorphic
sources.query: "compute-in-memory" OR "in-memory computing" OR "processing-in-memory" OR "near-memory computing" OR "compute-in-SRAM" OR "memristive computing" OR neuromorphic
sources.notes: CIM, PIM, neuromorphic and non-von-Neumann hardware.

sources.name: Nature Integrated Photonic Computing
sources.query: "photonic accelerator" OR "photonic neural network" OR "optical neural network" OR "photonic computing" OR "photonic integrated circuit" OR "integrated photonics" OR "silicon photonics"
sources.notes: Integrated photonics relevant to computing, interconnect and quantum hardware.

sources.name: Nature Quantum Processors & Qubits
sources.query: "quantum processor" OR "quantum computer" OR "quantum chip" OR qubit OR transmon OR "superconducting qubit" OR "spin qubit" OR "silicon qubit" OR "trapped-ion"
sources.notes: Quantum processors, qubits and experimental computing hardware.

sources.name: Nature Quantum Algorithms, QEC & Simulation
sources.query: "quantum error correction" OR "fault-tolerant quantum" OR "quantum algorithm" OR "quantum simulation" OR "quantum annealing" OR "quantum network" OR "quantum memory"
sources.notes: Computing-level quantum advances that an experimental hardware researcher should still follow.

sources.name: Nature Qubit Readout & Cryogenic Control
sources.query: "cryogenic CMOS" OR "cryo-CMOS" OR "qubit readout" OR "qubit control" OR "quantum controller" OR "readout integrated circuit" OR "RF reflectometry" OR "parametric amplifier"
sources.notes: Cryogenic electronics and readout/control circuits for quantum systems.

sources.name: Nature Superconducting Quantum Circuits
sources.query: "superconducting circuit" OR "superconducting qubit" OR "Josephson junction" OR "single flux quantum" OR SFQ OR "parametric amplifier" OR fluxonium
sources.notes: Superconducting quantum circuits and supporting microwave hardware.

sources.name: Nature Chiplets & Advanced Packaging
sources.query: chiplet OR "2.5D integration" OR "3D integration" OR "advanced packaging" OR "heterogeneous integration" OR "wafer-scale integration"
sources.notes: Chiplets, 2.5D/3D integration and advanced packaging.

sources.name: Nature Electronics Safety Sweep
sources.query: chip OR CMOS OR transistor OR processor OR accelerator OR memory OR sensor OR photonic OR neuromorphic OR quantum
sources.notes: Journal-specific safety sweep to catch terminology not covered by topic queries.

sources.name: Nature Communications Hardware Safety Sweep
sources.query: "integrated circuit" OR CMOS OR transistor OR accelerator OR "in-memory computing" OR "integrated photonics" OR "quantum processor" OR qubit
sources.notes: High-value Nature Communications hardware safety net.
